channel.title: GRIDWATCH
channel.description: Outages x weather x data center proximity, Midwest to Atlantic

item.title: GRIDWATCH 2026-07-19T03:58Z — 1585 outages, 101,648 customers, 376 fair-weather, 9 DC-proximate
item.description: PA-PPL: 2667 cust (UNEXPLAINED FAIR-WEATHER) | BGE: 2214 cust (WEATHER-LIKELY) | VA-DOM: 2178 cust (WEATHER-LIKELY) | OH-DUKE: 1933 cust (UNEXPLAINED FAIR-WEATHER) | PA-NY: 1609 cust (WEATHER-LIKELY)
